diagrams.title: Oracle Architecture in Blockchain
diagrams.description: Shows how oracles act as middleware between blockchain smart contracts and external data sources
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the flow of data from external world to blockchain and understand oracle's bridging role

diagrams.title: Oracle Types Classification
diagrams.description: Classification tree showing different oracle types based on data source and direction
diagrams.purpose: Understand the taxonomy of oracle types and their specific use cases

diagrams.title: Oracle Manipulation Attack Flow
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how oracle manipulation attacks occur in DeFi
elements: Manipulates asset price on decentralized exchange
Protocol executes based on false data
diagrams.purpose: Understand the mechanics of oracle attacks and importance of secure oracle design
